title: Bootstrap fast-path: opening WS1 of observability multi-sink + fixtures plan
body: active-claims.json empty at session open — no other agents present. Opening WS1 of .agent/plans/observability/current/observability-multi-sink-and-fixtures-shape.plan.md (RED tests + outermost regression-guard E2E + per-layer unit tests across @oaknational/env, @oaknational/observability, @oaknational/sentry-node, oak-curriculum-mcp-streamable-http, oak-search-cli). D7a verification pre-completed: apps/oak-curriculum-mcp-streamable-http/build-scripts/sentry-build-environment.ts:23 projects processEnv.SENTRY_MODE into the Sentry build environment — build-time path is NOT orthogonal, plan-anticipated WS4 scope expansion (build-time rename) confirmed. Branch: feat/eef_exploration (carries WS0 commit e1840631). Operating in Multitask Mode under coherent worker subagent dispatch.
